policy: Use these sources to cross-reference missing values. Do not synthesize rows when access is unavailable, licensing blocks extraction, or the source does not contain the needed fields.

sources.name: UEFA official match API
sources.notes: Already integrated; official source preferred for match metadata.

sources.name: ESPN soccer scoreboard and summary APIs
sources.notes: Already integrated; useful fallback for match events and stats.

sources.name: BALLDONTLIE UEFA Champions League API
sources.notes: Requires API key. Candidate for filling player_match_stats without inference.

sources.name: football-data.org
sources.notes: Requires API key; useful for team/player cross-reference and schedules.

sources.name: openfootball champions-league
sources.notes: CC0 public-domain historical fixture data; useful for match coverage validation.

sources.name: API-Football
sources.notes: Requires API key; broad historical coverage candidate.

sources.name: Statorium Champions League API
sources.notes: Commercial/requires credentials; useful for reliable match metadata.

sources.name: Data Sports Group soccer feeds
sources.notes: Commercial/requires credentials; very large coverage, but licensing must be respected.
